title: 501st, Take Off!
overview: The members of the 501st Joint Fighter Wing are humanity's greatest defense against the Neuroi threat. These rare and valuable records show a side of them you’ve never seen before…

title: 501st, Clean Your Dirty Rooms?
overview: Hartmann's filthy room is to the point where it's out of control. The rest of the 501st comes to clean it, but finds things are worse than they feared.

title: 501st, Head Out To Shop?
overview: It's payday, and payday means a shopping trip! But going into town to shop means getting in a car with speed demon Charlotte...

title: 501st, It's Time For Halloween?
overview: It's time for Halloween, and the witches are ready to play tricks and get treats. But some doors are better left undisturbed...

title: 501st, Time For A Haircut?
overview: Mio's hair is getting a little long, but is it safe to let anybody in the 501st cut it?

title: 501st, Are You Feeling Stressed?
overview: War is tough, but Miyafuji is ready to solve everybody's stress-related problems.

title: 501st, Get Ready for Setsubun?
overview: It's time for the Fuso holiday of Setsubun, and that means it's time for throwing beans, and eating yummy Fuso food!

title: 501st, Get Ready for Night Work?
overview: The Neuroi are coming tonight, which means that everybody needs to stay up! How will they stay awake, though?

title: 501st, You Can't Fly Anymore?
overview: Miyafuji's lost the ability to fly. Has she put on weight from eating everybody's food?

title: 501st, Are You Feeling the Heat?
overview: It's the middle of summer, and everybody's burning up! How do they beat the heat?

title: 501st, Time to Save Lives?
overview: Hartmann may look like a lazy slacker, but she's actually working really hard to learn to be a doctor! Now she wants to teach the others to do CPR, but...

title: 501st, You're Splitting Up?
overview: It's time for the final battle, and the 501st isn't invited! Instead, they'll be taking a nice, safe vacation on a tropical island...

title: Miyafuji, Are You Making a Movie?
overview: The members of the 501st Joint Fighter Wing are humanity's greatest defense against the Neuroi threat. These rare and valuable records show a side of them you’ve never seen before…

title: Hikari, You're Taking a Test?
overview: Hikari is after the chance to get to go to war with her sister Takami. But first, she has to pass a tough test, and her rival is gunning for her!

title: 501st, You're Paying Them Back?
overview: Miyafuji's great journey to repay all the other witches for their help begins! Her first stop, Perrine's orphanage. Will Perrine ever come home?

title: Introducing the 502nd?
overview: The Brave Witches can't wait for Takami to arrive! But something's gone very wrong, and she may not be making the trip!

title: 501st, You're Seeing Through the Lies?
overview: Mio's hair is getting a little long, but is it safe to let anybody in the 501st cut it?

title: 502nd, You're Joining the Team?
overview: Hikari arrives at the 502nd! But the team is expecting her famous and much more capable sister… Will they let her join the team?

title: 501st, Your Feelings Are Different?
overview: Eila, Sanya, and Sakamoto are finished dealing with the mess the Yamato made. But now Sakamoto and Sanya don't want to come home?

title: 502nd, You're Going for a Cold Swim?
overview: Nipa's got the perfect way for the whole team to beat the Orussian winter chills… a swim in the freezing river!

title: 501st, Plots Are in Motion?
overview: Miyafuji's lost the ability to fly. Has she put on weight from eating everybody's food?

title: 502nd, You're Running Your First Errand?
overview: Hikari's sick! Somebody needs to take care of her, but what happens if it's Nipa, the most accident-prone girl in the world?

title: 501st, You're Going Back to that Sky?
overview: Hartmann may look like a lazy slacker, but she's actually working really hard to learn to be a doctor! Now she wants to teach the others to do CPR, but...

title: 502nd, Sister Aces are Taking Off?
overview: Takami is so worried about Hikari that she flies all the way to Europe! Will the sister aces be reunited at last?
